summary: Completed focused testing of TimeTravel Agency booking form and chatbot functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly with proper validation. Chatbot AI integration fully functional. Critical issue remains with booking form destination selection not updating UI state.

ui_bugs.issue: Destination selection dropdown does not update display value after selection - still shows placeholder 'Choisissez une destination' even after clicking on Paris 1889

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Chat endpoint with AI integration working (OpenAI GPT responses)
Chat session continuity maintained across messages
Booking endpoint accepts valid data and returns booking ID
Booking endpoint properly validates invalid data (422 status)
Booking endpoint returns string_too_short error for empty name field
Chat endpoint error handling for missing session_id
Booking form date picker selection working
Booking form name, email, phone fields accepting input correctly
Chatbot opens and displays window correctly
Chatbot sends messages and receives AI responses

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (most features working, 1 critical UI bug with destination selection)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix booking form destination selection issue - the Select component onValueChange handler is not properly updating the displayed value in the UI. The form state may be updating internally but the SelectValue component is not reflecting the selected option.
